idempotent_source.note: Orthogonality, unit sum, commutativity, associativity, and half-braiding centrality are inherited from the v14 Drinfeld Grothendieck center certificate. This fast trace certificate does not rerun the timed-out full A985 centrality sweep.

timed_out_local_command_for_full_sweep.reason: The full centrality sweep over 39 idempotents and 985 basis relations crossed the timeout boundary. This command is included for local execution if full A985 centrality re-verification is desired.

verified_claims: The regular traces of the 39 Drinfeld primitive idempotents are perfect squares.
The square roots of those regular traces recover the full Wedderburn block-size multiset of A_985.
The sum of the recovered block-dimension squares is 985.
The permutation trace of the same idempotents decomposes the 2576-point dodecad shell into 39 isotypic ranks.
Each permutation rank is block_dimension times an integral multiplicity.
The q42 and q12 diagonal shadows of the Drinfeld idempotents have ranks 12 and 6 respectively.
